tagline: A brutal deterministic closed-loop temporal matrix
visualizationReason: Causality itself functions as the supreme power system; the timeline is a malleable battlespace.

powerSystem.name: Titan Shifting
powerSystem.subtitle: Biological Mech Piloting
powerSystem.loreDesc: The ability of specific human hosts to transform into giant, specialized humanoid entities by drawing flesh and bone from an alternate dimension via self-inflicted injury.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A virtual machine instantiation where a local user requests immense cloud computing resources to temporarily spin up an overpowered localized instance.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Reiner and Bertholdt reveal their true identities atop the wall, triggering a dual transformation that shatters the fragile peace of humanity.

powerSystem.name: ODM Gear
powerSystem.subtitle: Kinetic Physics Exploitation
powerSystem.loreDesc: A pressurized gas and grappling hook system that allows normal humans to move freely through the air at high velocities to sever the nape of a Titan's neck.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A highly optimized, low-level execution script that maximizes hardware efficiency, allowing standard nodes to bypass heavy firewalls through sheer velocity.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Levi executes a dizzying, high-speed evasion and subsequent brutal vivisection of the Beast Titan amidst a forest of giant trees.

powerSystem.name: The Paths
powerSystem.subtitle: Quantum Entanglement Protocol
powerSystem.loreDesc: An invisible, timeless dimension connecting all Subjects of Ymir, serving as the universal conduit for transferring memories, Titan bodies, and absolute genetic commands.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A ubiquitous, hard-coded intranet utilizing quantum entanglement to ensure zero-latency data transfer between a master server and all client nodes simultaneously.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Eren addresses all Subjects of Ymir simultaneously within their own minds, declaring the initiation of the apocalyptic global Rumbling.

powerSystem.name: Titan Hardening
powerSystem.subtitle: Structural Material Engineering
powerSystem.loreDesc: The innate ability to instantly crystallize Titan flesh into indestructible diamond-like armor, capable of forming weapons, shielding, or permanent architectural structures.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A dynamic encryption sequence that solidifies vulnerable code blocks into immutable, read-only data structures that cannot be easily parsed, modified, or destroyed.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: The War Hammer Titan materializes a massive, intricately crystallized broadsword directly from the ground to impale the Attack Titan.

rankings.topTierLore: The ultimate commander-in-chief of all three military branches, holding absolute authority over humanity's armed forces, strategic direction, and judicial military tribunals.
rankings.topTierSystem: The root administrator possessing read, write, and execute permissions across all system directories, user groups, and background processes.

tiers.name: Commander (Danchō)
tiers.loreDesc: The absolute leader of a specific military branch.
tiers.systemDesc: A lead software architect managing the deployment and lifecycle of a specific microservice environment.

tiers.name: Section Commander
tiers.loreDesc: High-ranking officers responsible for specialized detachments, intelligence gathering, or research divisions.
tiers.systemDesc: A senior systems engineer managing a specialized functional pipeline or data ingestion routine.

tiers.name: Captain (Heichō)
tiers.loreDesc: Elite field commanders entrusted with highly sensitive tactical operations and the direct oversight of elite, hand-picked personnel.
tiers.systemDesc: A high-priority, automated background daemon designed for rapid threat isolation and neutralization.

tiers.name: Squad Leader (Hanchō)
tiers.loreDesc: Mid-level officers responsible for managing small, cohesive fireteams of 4 to 10 soldiers during chaotic combat scenarios.
tiers.systemDesc: Load balancers, dynamically distributing combat tasks and resource allocation among individual computational threads.

tiers.name: Soldier / Private
tiers.loreDesc: The base-level recruits, cadets, and foot soldiers who form the vast bulk of the military force.
tiers.systemDesc: Standard, low-level computational nodes performing repetitive, high-mortality execution tasks.

characters.name: Eren Yeager
characters.title: The Usurper
characters.loreBio: Driven by a pathological obsession with freedom and deeply scarred by the loss of his mother, he evolves from humanity's most fervent savior into an apocalyptic global threat.
characters.systemBio: A standard user node that maliciously acquires root access, bypassing external firewalls to rewrite the system's core registry. Initiates an unrecoverable wipe of all external servers.
characters.signatureMoment: Tricking his father through sophisticated future memory manipulation to slaughter the royal family.

characters.name: Mikasa Ackerman
characters.title: Humanity's Strongest Soldier
characters.loreBio: A descendant of a genetically engineered bloodline granting her the retained combat experience of her ancestors. She possesses obsessive devotion to ensuring Eren's survival.
characters.systemBio: A hard-coded daemon process running continuously in the background, programmed with a singular, unbreakable directive to ensure the uptime of the primary host node.
characters.signatureMoment: Brutally decapitating the Jaw Titan in a high-speed, mid-air maneuver to secure Eren's safe extraction during the raid on Liberio.

characters.name: Armin Arlert
characters.title: The Strategist
characters.loreBio: Initially frail, his intellectual capacity and tactical genius make him the most vital asset. He eventually inherits the devastating power of the Colossal Titan.
characters.systemBio: A highly sophisticated predictive analytics engine capable of parsing chaotic, real-time system data to generate optimal execution paths and resource allocation under extreme constraints.
characters.signatureMoment: Formulating a suicidal strategy to distract the Colossal Titan by enduring lethal steam burns, allowing Eren to extract the pilot.

characters.name: Levi Ackerman
characters.title: Captain
characters.loreBio: The legendary squad captain universally recognized as humanity's strongest soldier. His masterful ODM gear movement makes him an unstoppable kinetic force.
characters.systemBio: An isolated, heavily overclocked processing thread that routinely bypasses standard thermal limits to deliver maximum DPS, identifying and terminating high-level malware.
characters.signatureMoment: A dizzying, brutal vivisection of the Beast Titan in a forest, reducing a major, seemingly invincible threat to a mutilated husk in mere seconds.

characters.name: Reiner Braun
characters.title: The Shield Warrior
characters.loreBio: A Marleyan child soldier sent to infiltrate Paradis who develops a severe dissociative identity disorder from the crushing guilt of his betrayals.
characters.systemBio: A robust, hardware-level firewall that successfully infiltrates an enemy network but subsequently suffers critical sector corruption and logic loops due to conflicting parameters.
characters.signatureMoment: Surviving a direct, catastrophic decapitation attempt by rapidly transferring his neurological consciousness throughout his Titan's central nervous system.

characters.name: Zeke Yeager
characters.title: Warchief
characters.loreBio: Eren's highly intelligent half-brother, possessing royal blood that inadvertently unlocks the Founding Titan's true potential. Harbors a nihilistic plan to euthanize his own race.
characters.systemBio: A compromised wireless router operating with a backdoor exploit, capable of broadcasting malicious packet payloads to infected nodes seeking to wipe the entire database.
characters.signatureMoment: Shredding an entire cavalry charge of Survey Corps soldiers to pieces with a supersonic barrage of crushed boulders.

relationships.loreDesc: Mikasa's identity, emotional stability, and immense combat lethality are entirely anchored to Eren's physical survival.
They share a foundational childhood dream, but their ethical methodologies and systemic execution completely diverge as the conflict escalates.
They represent two sides of the exact same coin: child soldiers pushed to commit horrific atrocities by systemic brainwashing.
A bitter, blood-soaked rivalry defined by Levi's solemn promise to his dying commander that he would assassinate the Beast Titan at any cost.
Zeke genuinely believes he is saving Eren, completely unaware that Eren intends to co-opt Zeke's royal blood to bypass the system and initiate the apocalypse.
Two Ackerman-blooded soldiers inheriting the same genetically encoded combat instincts, but diverging completely in what anchors them — Mikasa to a person, Levi to a promise.
Both inherit command they never wanted — Reiner as Warrior Vice-Captain, Armin as Survey Corps Commander — and both crack under the moral weight of sending others to die.
Fellow Warriors from the same graduating class, bound by shared Marleyan indoctrination but holding fundamentally incompatible visions for what their service should achieve.
Levi staked his career on Eren's containment, vouching for his loyalty before the tribunal. Eren repaid this by orchestrating a coup that dismantled everything Levi's squad died to protect.

factions.name: Survey Corps
factions.loreDesc: The elite, heavily attrited branch dedicated to external exploration and direct Titan combat. They relentlessly seek the truth defined by massive casualty rates.
factions.systemDesc: An aggressive, highly optimized penetration-testing subroutine designed to relentlessly probe external firewalls, constantly updating based on fatal feedback loops.

factions.name: Marley Warrior Unit
factions.loreDesc: Eldian child soldiers subjected to intense imperial brainwashing by the Marleyan empire, granted the power of the Nine Titans to serve as biological WMDs.
factions.systemDesc: A sophisticated botnet of infected sleeper nodes deployed by a hostile server to infiltrate, map, and extract administrative root keys from an isolated legacy mainframe.

factions.name: Yeagerists
factions.loreDesc: A radical, heavily armed ultra-nationalist paramilitary faction viewing Eren Yeager as a messianic figure, staging a violent coup.
factions.systemDesc: A rapid, decentralized malware infection that executes a total hostile takeover of the host operating system from the inside out.

factions.name: Anti-Marleyan Volunteers
factions.loreDesc: Conscripted soldiers from conquered nations within the Marleyan military who secretly defect to assist Paradis, providing advanced technology.
factions.systemDesc: Third-party API developers offering essential technological integration to a legacy system, while secretly embedding undetectable backdoors into the foundational code.

factions.name: Fritz / Reiss Monarchy
factions.loreDesc: The hidden royal bloodline that secretly governed the Walls for a century, deliberately suppressing all knowledge of the outside world and enforcing humanity's captivity through Founding Titan memory wipes.
factions.systemDesc: A legacy root administrator account running in stealth mode, enforcing a system-wide information quarantine while actively overwriting user memory sectors to maintain operational ignorance.

rules.name: The Curse of Ymir
rules.subtitle: Biological Obsolescence
rules.loreConsequence: Any human who inherits the power of the Nine Titans will suffer rapid cellular degradation and die exactly 13 years after acquiring the power.
rules.systemEquivalent: A hard-coded, unalterable cache expiration protocol; after an exact timestamp is reached, the memory block is wiped and automatically reallocated.

rules.name: Vow Renouncing War
rules.subtitle: Ideological Firmware Lock
rules.loreConsequence: Any royal inheriting the Founding Titan is instantly brainwashed by pacifist ideology, rendering the ultimate weapon completely useless in combat.
rules.systemEquivalent: A non-overridable firmware lock placed directly onto the root administrative account, permanently blocking the execution of any offensive command lines.

rules.name: Subject of Ymir Connectivity
rules.subtitle: Mandatory Intranet Hub
rules.loreConsequence: All individuals bearing Eldian blood are perpetually connected to the Founding Titan via the interdimensional Paths, unable to break the connection.
rules.systemEquivalent: A mandatory, persistent peer-to-peer network connection that lacks an opt-out mechanism or local firewall, allowing forced over-the-air registry updates.

counterplay.loreDesc: A volatile, shaped-charge explosive designed specifically to crack and penetrate the localized crystalline armor, effectively obsoleting the Armored Titan's primary defensive advantage.

Eren uses the Jaw Titan's uniquely hardened teeth and extreme bite force as a biological nutcracker, exploiting one Titan's natural offensive weapon to violently breach another Titan's ultimate defense.
The Ackerman bloodline packs the raw kinetic strength and combat instincts of a Titan into a compact human frame, granting the speed necessary to automatically dismantle larger, sluggish Shifters.

The Founding Titan broadcasts commands through the Paths that rewrite Eldian biology at the cellular level — converting humans into Titans, erasing memories across entire populations, or hardening their flesh into architectural structures.

A non-royal Founding Titan holder physically touches a royal-blooded Titan to momentarily inherit root privileges without triggering the pacifist firmware lock — the only known exploit against the Vow's absolute constraint.

anomalies.name: Attack Titan Timeline Retro-Causality
anomalies.loreDesc: The Attack Titan represents a massive systemic anomaly allowing its inheritor to transmit specific memories backward across time to previous holders.
anomalies.systemDesc: A process that completely shatters linear execution paths, allowing future outputs to retro-actively overwrite their prerequisite input variables and forge a bootstrap paradox loop.

anomalies.name: Abnormal Titans
anomalies.loreDesc: Titans that occasionally bypass the hard-coded instinct to indiscriminately consume humans, demonstrating erratic behaviors like speech, mourning, or non-bipedal locomotion.
anomalies.systemDesc: Software execution deviations highlighting the chaotic nature of the processing sequence, where external noise deeply corrupts the base biological code resulting in unpredictable behavior.

anomalies.name: Ackerman Paths Independence
anomalies.loreDesc: The Ackerman bloodline is connected to the Paths network but completely immune to the Founding Titan's memory manipulation, making them the only Subjects of Ymir who cannot be overwritten by the root administrator.
anomalies.systemDesc: A client node hardwired into the mandatory intranet but running a local firewall kernel that blocks all incoming registry overwrites — connected to the network yet immune to its broadcast commands.

anomalies.name: Hallucigenia Parasitic Autonomy
anomalies.loreDesc: The primordial organism that fused with Ymir Fritz operates as an independent entity with its own survival imperative, capable of acting autonomously to defend the Titan system even after the Founding Titan's will is contested.
anomalies.systemDesc: The original rootkit source code exhibiting autonomous self-preservation behavior independent of any user — a parasitic runtime that predates and outlives every administrator account ever instantiated on the system.

causalEvents.name: Ymir's Fall
causalEvents.trigger: A hunted, severely wounded slave girl falls into a subterranean pool, fusing with the Hallucigenia.
causalEvents.consequence: The manifestation of the first Titan entity, initiating 2,000 years of global biological warfare.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The origin point of all systemic powers; an organic singularity that binds an entire race of people into a shared, inescapable genetic destiny.
causalEvents.systemDesc: The initial zero-day rootkit injection that permanently corrupted the base human registry across the entire Eldian segment, establishing a permanent interdimensional cloud server (Paths).

causalEvents.name: The Reiss Chapel Massacre
causalEvents.trigger: Future Eren transmits curated, terrifying memories to Grisha, actively coercing him to murder the pacifist royal family.
causalEvents.consequence: Grisha slaughters the royals, steals the Founding Titan, and transfers both Titans to young Eren.
causalEvents.loreDesc: A pristine example of a bootstrap paradox, establishing that the future actively dictates the past to ensure its own localized existence.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A sophisticated sequence-breaking exploit where a future output node forcibly rewrote the parameter arrays of its prerequisite functions, guaranteeing its own recursive execution.

causalEvents.name: The Smiling Titan Encounter
causalEvents.trigger: Eren punches the open palm of the Smiling Titan, who secretly possesses latent royal blood.
causalEvents.consequence: Eren temporarily bypasses the Vow Renouncing War, unlocking the Coordinate and commanding pure Titans to destroy the threat.
causalEvents.loreDesc: An exploitation of system loopholes; a non-royal user gains momentary root admin privileges by establishing brief contact with a dormant royal node.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A critical vulnerability exploitation allowing an unauthenticated legacy node to temporarily utilize the absolute permissions of the locked root administrator.

causalEvents.name: The Fall of Wall Maria
causalEvents.trigger: The Colossal and Armored Titans breach the outermost wall, destroying Shiganshina District and killing Eren's mother.
causalEvents.consequence: Humanity loses one-third of its territory, triggering a refugee crisis and the chain of events that eventually unravels the truth of the world.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The inciting catastrophe that collapses a century of enforced peace. A Warrior infiltration operation disguised as a natural disaster, setting the entire narrative causal chain into motion.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A coordinated perimeter breach by two sleeper agents that crashed the outermost firewall layer, triggering a cascading resource crisis across all remaining system partitions.

causalEvents.name: The Declaration of War
causalEvents.trigger: Eren reveals himself beneath the Liberio stage, confirming to Reiner that he has crossed the ocean to do to Marley exactly what Marley did to Paradis.
causalEvents.consequence: Eren transforms inside a civilian population center, kills the War Hammer Titan holder, and triggers a global conflict that makes diplomacy permanently impossible.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The moment the cycle of violence completes its mirror rotation. The child who lost his home to an enemy attack now delivers the identical trauma to his enemy's homeland, confirming the loop.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A retaliatory DDoS strike launched from inside the opposing network's civilian infrastructure, permanently escalating the conflict from containable skirmish to total system war.

causalEvents.name: The Rumbling
causalEvents.trigger: Eren makes physical contact with Zeke in the Paths dimension, rejects the euthanasia plan, and commands Ymir Fritz to unleash the Wall Titans.
causalEvents.consequence: Millions of Colossal Titans emerge from the Walls and begin a global march of extermination, flattening approximately 80% of all life outside Paradis Island.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The terminal consequence of every prior causal event — a planetary extinction march initiated by a single individual who concluded that absolute freedom requires absolute annihilation of all external threats.
causalEvents.systemDesc: A catastrophic root-level command executing a global wipe of all external servers. The recursive causal chain reaches its terminal output: total environmental reset initiated by the very node the system was designed to contain.
